svg.title: Cross-modal attention fusion diagram
svg.desc: Flowchart showing how visual (face/gaze) and audio (speech emotion) modalities are fused to compute a per-face attention score.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the solvePnP head-pose gaze layer in app.py')
sendPrompt('Explain the iris gaze layer in app.py')
sendPrompt('Explain the ViT gaze angle model layer in app.py')
sendPrompt('Explain the face emotion model in app.py')
sendPrompt('Explain how Whisper is used in app.py')
sendPrompt('Explain the text emotion model in app.py')
sendPrompt('Explain how speech_category is computed in app.py')
sendPrompt('How is gaze_attentive computed in app.py?')
sendPrompt('How is emotion_attentive computed in app.py?')
sendPrompt('How is emo_modifier computed in app.py?')
sendPrompt('Show me the combined attention score formula from app.py')
sendPrompt('What happens after the attention label is set in app.py?')
